en.name: Lake Hora
en.description: Crater lake surrounded by resorts and cultural sites, famous for hosting annual cultural and religious events (Irreecha).
en.details: Lake Hora is one of the most famous lakes in Bishoftu, hosting traditional and cultural festivals.

am.name: ሐይቁ ሆራ
am.description: ባህላዊ ቦታዎችና ሪዞርቶች የተሸፈነ ክረትር ሐይቅ፣ እንዲሁም አመታዊ ባህላዊ እና ሃይማኖታዊ ክስተቶችን የሚያካትት።
am.details: ሐይቁ ሆራ በቢሾፍቱ ውስጥ ከፍተኛ ታዋቂ ሐይቅ ነው። ባህላዊ እና ባህላዊ ክስተቶችን ይያዛል።

or.name: Lake Hora
or.description: Laga crater kan naannoo resort fi bakka aadaa waliin qabdu, ayyaana aadaa fi amantii waggaa tokko tokkoof beekamtu.
or.details: Laga Hora Bishoftu keessatti beekamtuudha, ayyaana aadaa fi aadaa biyya keessa ni qabdi.

en.name: Lake Babogaya
en.description: Peaceful freshwater lake ideal for relaxation, birdwatching, and enjoying scenic sunsets.
en.details: Known for tranquility and migratory bird sightings.

am.name: ሐይቁ ባቦጋያ
am.description: የሰላም ውኃ ሐይቅ ለማረፊያ፣ የወፎች መመልከት እና ውብ መሸዋዎች የተሻለ።
am.details: በጸጥታ እና የወለላ ወፎች ማየት የታወቀ።

or.name: Lake Babogaya
or.description: Laga bishaan qulqulluu tasgabbii qabu, ilaalcha simbirroo fi galgala aduu bareedaa ilaaluf mijataa.
or.details: Beekamtii tasgabbii fi simbirroota imalaa ti.

en.name: Kuriftu Resort & Spa
en.description: Luxury lakeside destination blending natural beauty with leisure and resort facilities.
en.details: Offers spa, fine dining, and leisure activities.

am.name: ኩሪፍቱ ሪዞርት እና ስፓ
am.description: ለውብነት እና ምቹነት በተለያዩ አገልግሎቶች የተዋቀረ የሐይቅ አጠገብ ሪዞርት።
am.details: ስፓ፣ የግል ምግብ እና መዝናኛ እንቅስቃሴዎች ይሰጣሉ።

or.name: Kuriftu Resort & Spa
or.description: Bakki ciisichaa naannoo laga kan tajaajila fi bareedina uumamaa waliin qindaa’e.
or.details: Spa, nyaata gaarii fi sochii bashannanaa ni kenna.

en.name: Local Market Cultural Tour
en.description: Explore traditional crafts, local products, and authentic Ethiopian culture.
en.details: Guided tours available for cultural immersion.

am.name: የአካባቢ ገበያ ባህላዊ ጉብኝት
am.description: ባህላዊ እና የኢትዮጵያ ምርቶችን ያሳዩ እና ባህላዊ ባህል ያማከሩ።

or.name: Local Market Cultural Tour
or.description: Aadaa fi oomisha naannoo beekamaa, akkasumas aadaa dhugaa Itoophiyaa baradhu.
or.details: Daawwannaa qajeeltoo aadaa fi aadaa dhugaa irratti ni kennama.

en.name: Bishoftu Tour Guides Association
en.description: Professional local guides for authentic Bishoftu experiences.
en.details: Experienced guides offering personalized tours including cultural immersion and adventure hikes.

am.name: የቢሾፍቱ መሪዎች ማህበር
am.description: ለቢሾፍቱ እውነተኛ ልምዶች የተሰሩ ባለሙያ መሪዎች።
am.details: ባለሙያ መሪዎች ባህላዊ እና ግል ልምዶች የተሟላ ጉዞ ይሰጣሉ።

or.name: Bishoftu Tour Guides Association
or.description: Tajaajila gosa Bishoftu dhugaa kennuuf qajeeltoota biyya keessaa.
or.details: Qajeeltoonni muuxannoo qabu daawwannaa namoomaa, aadaa fi daandii seenaa ni kennu.
